title: KaanAlper's Modpack
description: High FPS Boost pack under Fabric for low system computer and some mods for graphical quaintness.
body:
Modpack optimizes visuals and increases FPS for the main purpose, and reduces the load on the graphics card since it uses fabric and runs on the Sodium base. While in ALT-TAB state, it limits the fps and deletes the entities on the invisible side of the screen. It adjusts the vision settings of the system and therefore reduces RAM usage. Additionally, it adds visual enhancements for client side, such as chest item placement. Mods do not pose any ban risk (tried). It also does not prevent you from entering any server.
